element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tutorial stage establishes punch/kick mechanics against basic enemies
Scattered throughout levels, extends player combo range and damage
Found in destructible objects and enemy drops, sustains health through stage
Progressive boss difficulty tests learned mechanics before advancing
Introduces ranged enemies, armored foes, multi-enemy coordination
Obstacles and moving platforms require spatial awareness beyond combat
Forces player to manage positioning and timing against 4+ enemies

typical_relief_triggers: Finding food item to restore health
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Steady escalation with punctuated intensity peaks at stage bosses; resource management creates micro-tension between enemy encounters

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden bonuses in Bay Area stage (dog bonus pickups) require precise vertical positioning - signals optional skill-based exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Background animals (barking dogs) grant hidden bonuses when character X/Y coordinates overlap correctly - non-intuitive hidden mechanic

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to combat fundamentals with forgiving enemy placement and abundant resources
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy density and introduction of ranged/armored enemy types; resource scarcity increases tension
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminates in climactic boss fights with complex patterns and high damage output; limited recovery items
notable_spikes: Stage boss transitions introduce damage patterns not seen in standard enemy encounters
Final stage condenses enemy variety and density significantly

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal scrolling through multiple zones with escalating enemy waves, culminating in single-boss encounter at stage end
Player must manage health and weapon durability through stage; destructible objects and enemy drops provide resource supply
Bay Area stage contains precise vertical positioning requirements for dog bonus pickups; rewards exploration and spatial precision
Each stage boss requires recognizing attack patterns and timing punish windows; damage outputs exceed standard enemy threats

sources_used: tcrf - Final Fight (SNES) - The Cutting Room Floor
